text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the training grounds to see how Mejiro McQueen is faring
on the day after her tryout race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This won't do. I can't seem to channel strength into my legs, just like
yesterday. This is worrisome...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You... I'm sorry, have we met?
choice_data_list: Not yet. I'm a new trainer. Nice to meet you.
Not yet. I'm a new trainer. Nice to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My, a trainer? Have you come to observe my routine, perchance?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What an honor! I must thank you for coming out here for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Though, I must ask: what is it about me that you wish to observe?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As you no doubt saw, I did naught but practically drag my family's
name through the mud at yesterday's tryout race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So after seeing that, why me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Tenacity... I see. Thank you for looking beyond the surface level.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family, it wouldn't suit me to be weak
of will.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, I am glad I was able to show that I remain
unshakable in my efforts to succeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Though, I do hope that you will refrain from deciding whether or not
to bring me under your tutelage until after you have seen me run
more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Another thing that I possess as a Mejiro is a certain lofty
ambition—one that I cannot afford to leave unfulfilled under any
circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes. Namely, victory at the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That is, of course, something I cannot hope to accomplish without the
proper guidance from a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If that trainer were not able to place their full confidence in my
ability, then there is no conceivable way that I would receive said
guidance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So again, please wait to decide whether or not to scout me until you
have properly assessed my capabilities.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I need to be assured that my trainer will uphold me to the standards
expected of a Mejiro.
choice_data_list:
You take a lot of pride in the Mejiro name,
don't you?

You take a lot of pride in the Mejiro name,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Of course! It is such a privilege to have been born to my house.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I am surrounded by a caring family—people who have supported me
my whole life. I could not abide letting any of them down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It is thanks to them that I even stand on this training track now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I, as a Mejiro Umamusume, want nothing more than to
achieve the glory befitting of my family name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I must insist that you only make your decision after you
witness my physical ability as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I know very well that my showing yesterday was incredibly poor... But I will redeem myself here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Here I go. Observe the fruits of years of training within the Mejiro
estate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen takes off running, her spirits appearing somewhat
renewed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Likely owing to the fact that she has been training from a young age,
her form is refined and beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: All right... Once more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She possesses the energy and the tenacity fit for long distances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There is no doubt in my mind that she can become a first-class stayer,
easily capable of taking home a win at the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There is one thing I am concerned about, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... What did you think?
choice_data_list:
Do you find it difficult to channel strength into
your legs?

Do you find it difficult to channel strength into
your legs?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-well, um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, n-no! That's not the case at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Um, please excuse me! I'm going to run one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I can't embarass myself again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen continues to train as if nothing is amiss. I can clearly
see that isn't the case, however.
